1→	.text
     2→	.p2align	2
     3→	.globl	sinf
     4→	.type	sinf,@function
     5→sinf:
     6→	.globl	__gf_fpsin
     7→	.type	__gf_fpsin,@function
     8→__gf_fpsin:
     9→	addi	sp, sp, -48
    10→	sw	ra, 32(sp)
    11→	sw	x9, 16(sp)
    12→	sw	x18, 20(sp)
    13→	sw	x19, 24(sp)
    14→	sw	x10, 4(sp)              # 	swi	$r0, [$sp + #4]
    15→	call	__gf_fpreduct           # 	jal	__gf_fpreduct
    16→	mv	x9, x12                 # 	move	$r6, $r2
    17→	mv	x15, x11                # 	move	$r5, $r1
    18→	mv	x14, x10                # 	move	$r4, $r0
    19→	lw	x10, 4(sp)              # 	lwi	$r0, [$sp + #4]
    20→	bgez	x15, .Li5               # slti t6,x15,0 + beqz -> bgez
    21→	mv	x10, x14                # 	move	$r0, $r4
    22→	tail	.LB999                  # 	j	.LB999
    23→.Li5:
    24→	slli	x19, x9, 29             # 	slli	$r8, $r6, #29
    25→	xor	x10, x10, x19           # 	xor	$r0, $r0, $r8
    26→	li	x19, 2147483648         # 	move	$r8, #2147483648
    27→	and	x10, x10, x19           # 	and	$r0, $r0, $r8
    28→	mulhu	x13, x14, x14           # mulr64 high word only; dead mul+save/restore removed
    29→	li	x17, 126                # 	subri	$r1, $r5, #126
    30→	sub	x11, x17, x15
    31→	slli	x11, x11, 1             # 	slli	$r1, $r1, #1
    32→	li	x19, 32                 # 	move	$r8, #32
    33→	bltu	x11, x19, .LL4          # sltu t6 + bnez -> bltu
    34→	li	x13, 0                  # 	move	$r3, #0
    35→.LL4:
    36→	srl	x13, x13, x11           # 	srl	$r3, $r3, $r1
    37→	addi	x19, x9, -1             # 	addi	$r8, $r6, #-1
    38→	andi	x19, x19, 2             # 	andi	$r8, $r8, #2
    39→	beqz	x19, .Li6               # 	beqz	$r8, .Li6
    40→	la	x18, __gf_fpsincof      # 	la	$r7, __gf_fpsincof
    41→	lw	x11, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r1, [$r7 + #0]
    42→	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
    43→.Lb7:
    44→	mulhu	x11, x13, x11           # dead mul+save/restore of x20 removed
    45→	lw	x12, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r2, [$r7 + #0]
    46→	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
    47→	sub	x11, x12, x11           # 	sub	$r1, $r2, $r1
    48→	bgez	x12, .Lb7               # slti t6,x12,0 + beqz -> bgez
    49→	blez	x11, .Li8               # 	blez	$r1, .Li8
    50→	slli	x11, x11, 1             # 	slli	$r1, $r1, #1
    51→	addi	x15, x15, -1            # 	addi	$r5, $r5, #-1
    52→.Li8:
    53→	addi	x15, x15, 1             # 	addi	$r5, $r5, #1
    54→	mulhu	x14, x14, x11           # collapsed mv+mulhu+mul+mv+mv -> mulhu into x14 directly
    55→	tail	.Le6                    # 	j	.Le6
    56→.Li6:
    57→	la	x18, __gf_fpcoscof      # 	la	$r7, __gf_fpcoscof
    58→	lw	x14, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r4, [$r7 + #0]
    59→	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
    60→.Lb9:

    62→	lw	x12, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r2, [$r7 + #0]
    63→	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
    64→	sub	x14, x12, x14           # 	sub	$r4, $r2, $r4

    66→	li	x15, 127                # 	move	$r5, #127
    67→.Le6:

    76→	or	x10, x14, x10           # 	or	$r0, $r4, $r0
    77→.LB999:

    79→	lw	x18, 20(sp)
    80→	lw	x19, 24(sp)
    81→	lw	ra, 32(sp)
    82→	addi	sp, sp, 48
    83→	ret
    84→.Ltmp0:
    85→	.size	sinf, .Ltmp0-sinf
    86→

	.type	sinf,@function

	mv	x10, x14                # 	move	$r0, $r4
	tail	.LB999                  # 	j	.LB999
.Li5:
	slli	x19, x9, 29             # 	slli	$r8, $r6, #29
	xor	x10, x10, x19           # 	xor	$r0, $r0, $r8

	and	x10, x10, x19           # 	and	$r0, $r0, $r8
	mulhu	x13, x14, x14           # mulr64 high word only; dead mul+save/restore removed
	li	x17, 126                # 	subri	$r1, $r5, #126
	sub	x11, x17, x15
	slli	x11, x11, 1             # 	slli	$r1, $r1, #1
	li	x19, 32                 # 	move	$r8, #32
	bltu	x11, x19, .LL4          # sltu t6 + bnez -> bltu
	li	x13, 0                  # 	move	$r3, #0
.LL4:

	addi	x19, x9, -1             # 	addi	$r8, $r6, #-1
	andi	x19, x19, 2             # 	andi	$r8, $r8, #2
	beqz	x19, .Li6               # 	beqz	$r8, .Li6
	la	x18, __gf_fpsincof      # 	la	$r7, __gf_fpsincof
	lw	x11, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r1, [$r7 + #0]
	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
.Lb7:
	mulhu	x11, x13, x11           # dead mul+save/restore of x20 removed
	lw	x12, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r2, [$r7 + #0]
	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
	sub	x11, x12, x11           # 	sub	$r1, $r2, $r1
	bgez	x12, .Lb7               # slti t6,x12,0 + beqz -> bgez
	blez	x11, .Li8               # 	blez	$r1, .Li8
	slli	x11, x11, 1             # 	slli	$r1, $r1, #1
	addi	x15, x15, -1            # 	addi	$r5, $r5, #-1
.Li8:
	addi	x15, x15, 1             # 	addi	$r5, $r5, #1
	mulhu	x14, x14, x11           # collapsed mv+mulhu+mul+mv+mv -> mulhu into x14 directly
	tail	.Le6                    # 	j	.Le6
.Li6:
	la	x18, __gf_fpcoscof      # 	la	$r7, __gf_fpcoscof
	lw	x14, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r4, [$r7 + #0]
	addi	x18, x18, 4             # 	addi	$r7, $r7, #4
.Lb9:

	lw	x12, 0(x18)             # 	lwi	$r2, [$r7 + #0]

	sub	x14, x12, x14           # 	sub	$r4, $r2, $r4
	bgez	x12, .Lb9               # slti t6,x12,0 + beqz -> bgez
	li	x15, 127                # 	move	$r5, #127
.Le6:

	slli	x14, x14, 1             # 	slli	$r4, $r4, #1
	addi	x15, x15, -1            # 	addi	$r5, $r5, #-1
.LBretx:
	slli	x14, x14, 1             # 	slli	$r4, $r4, #1

	or	x14, x14, x19           # 	or	$r4, $r4, $r8
	or	x10, x14, x10           # 	or	$r0, $r4, $r0
.LB999:
	lw	x9, 16(sp)
	lw	x18, 20(sp)
	lw	x19, 24(sp)
	lw	ra, 32(sp)
	addi	sp, sp, 48
	ret
.Ltmp0:
	.size	sinf, .Ltmp0-sinf
